description: Style NoteWhen it comes to a wallet which is practical and as well as scoring high on style, this piece from lino perros is our first choice. White stitch detailing on the exterior give the wallet a tailored look while its multiple pouches and slots help you keep yourself organised.Product DetailsBlack wallet with panelled exteriorWhite top stitch detail on exteriorTextured surfaceTwo main compartmentsThree card slots on left with slip pocketCentre flap with three card slots, a mesh id card holder and a slip pocketOne slip pocket and one coin pocket on right with embossed brandingBrand logo embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize12 cm x 9 cm
